designs.name: BirthDays1
designs.description: Perfect for birthdays and also Elevate your summer style with our Trendy Overfit Men's Shirt Set with Pant! This unique 2-piece summer suit for men combines comfort and fashion effortlessly. Perfect for casual outings or beach days, the relaxed fit ensures a breezy feel

designs.name: BirthDays3
designs.description: A woman stands in a softly lit birthday venue wearing a red floor‑length Indo‑Western gown. The gown features delicate zari embroidery along the bodice and hem, sheer full sleeves, and a draped dupatta‑style sash cascading from one shoulder. She pairs it with gold heels and statement jhumka earrings.
